name: ActiveCampaign
tagline: Email marketing and CRM automation platform
description: ActiveCampaign combines email marketing, marketing automation, and CRM in one platform. Known for its powerful automation builder, it's popular with small to mid-size businesses that want to nurture leads through complex multi-step workflows.
use_cases: You run complex multi-step email automations with conditional branching and lead scoring
Your business depends on behaviour-triggered sequences (cart abandonment, site visits, link clicks)
You want CRM and email marketing tightly integrated in one platform
You're an agency or consultant managing lead nurture for multiple clients
